dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4313 IS: Halting Unilateral Money and Building Labeling by Egotistical Presidents Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Gillibrand introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To prohibit the use of the name, image, likeness, or signature of a sitting President on Federal assets, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Halting Unilateral Money and Building Labeling by Egotistical Presidents Act or the HUMBLE Presidents Act.

section.header: Prohibitions relating to the use of names, images, likenesses, and signatures of sitting Presidents

subsection.text: In this section, the term covered asset means—

paragraph.text: Federal property, including a Federal building; and

subsection.text: The name, image, likeness, or signature of a sitting President may not be used to designate or name a covered asset.
The name, image, likeness, or signature of a sitting President may not be used to decorate the exterior of a covered asset.
No Federal funds may be used to carry out an activity prohibited under subsection (b) or (c).

subsection.header: Prohibition with respect to the name, image, likeness, or signature of the President on United States coins and currency
subsection.text: Subchapter II of chapter 51 of title 31, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in section 5112, by adding at the end the following:

subsection.text: The name, image, likeness, or signature of the sitting President may not appear on any United States coin.

paragraph.text: in section 5114(b), by inserting after the first sentence the following: The name or signature of the sitting President, or any image or likeness of the sitting President that is not covered under the following sentence, may not appear on United States currency or securities..
